hyperedges.label: Registration Form Editor System (3-pane builder)
Field Type System (icons + labels + edit form)
Volume Pricing Band Data Flow (Band <-> RawBandValue <-> DB Tier)
RegistrationForm definition/seed/validate trinity (ADR-013 Phase 1)
Shop hint cookie F5 recovery: build / read / validate domain work together
Wholesale approval: authenticate + Shopify GraphQL mutations + Prisma upsert + discount sync
Wholesale/Volume pricing CRUD routes all call syncTiersToFunction after writes
App Proxy routes — all HMAC-authenticated via authenticate.public.appProxy
Onboarding wizard 3-step state machine (Segment → Preset → CTA)
GDPR redaction pipeline — data_request ack + customers/redact hard-delete + shop/redact cascade
FPQ qualification pipeline — orders/paid evaluates rule → writes metafield → syncs discount + validation functions
ADR-012 Volume Pricing — createRule/updateRule/listRules manage N-band groups sharing groupId
All three FPQ banner components share the same approved_pre_fpq gate logic and FPQ mode evaluation
QOF, WPP, and discount function share tier scope-precedence (product > collection > all) + multiplicative baseline
Opening order test suite validates function against all JSON fixtures
Discount type system — percentage, fixed_amount, fixed_price each emit different Shopify output shapes
Three aggregation modes — per_line, cart_total, mix_variants — partition eligible tiers before winner selection
DB schema evolution — 4 migrations add wholesaleBaselinePct, aggregation, FPQ fields to core B2B tables
Verification pipeline: verify.sh + stockly-verify skill + deployment-guardian gate
Agent pipeline: orchestrator → implementer → reviewer → guardian
QOF design artifacts: prototype HTML + desktop screenshot + mobile screenshot

nodes.label: Skill: stockly-deploy-check
nodes.description: Pre-deploy safety checklist. Validates before fly deploy or shopify app deploy. Checks: verify green, working tree clean, diff reviewed, config files, HANDOFF update prepared. Does NOT execute deploy.

nodes.label: Skill: stockly-docs-sync
nodes.description: Detects and fixes contradictions between documentation files. Source-of-truth hierarchy: HANDOFF.md > newest ADR > config files > README/PROJECT/ROADMAP.

nodes.label: Skill: stockly-session-start
nodes.description: Orient at session start: reads HANDOFF.md, tasks/current.md, git log, git status. Reports state + top P0 action. Asks user what to tackle.

nodes.label: Skill: stockly-verify
nodes.description: Runs bash scripts/verify.sh. Interprets exit codes: 0=green, 1=failure (diagnose), 2=structural invariant broken.

nodes.label: CI Workflow: Lint + Typecheck + Test
nodes.description: Runs on push/PR to main. Steps: npm ci, prisma generate, lint, tsc --noEmit, npm test. Followed by build job.

nodes.label: B2B Market Gap (Shopify Basic/Grow)
nodes.description: Shopify Plus B2B features are $2,300/mo. Stockly delivers equivalent B2B features on Basic/Grow at $39-149/mo.

nodes.label: Target Market: Premium Luxury SMB
nodes.description: Jewelry, beauty, fashion, home decor. Brand profile: cares about aesthetic, 50-500 SKUs, $100k-2M annual revenue. 5-50 wholesale leads/month.

nodes.label: Business Model Phase 1 (Custom App)
nodes.description: 3 pilot clients x $4-5k upfront + $300-500/mo maintenance. Year 1 estimate $26-29k. Near-zero infra costs.

nodes.label: Business Model Phase 2 (App Store)
nodes.description: Public Shopify App Store. Tiers: Starter $39/mo, Growth $79/mo, Plus $149/mo. ARPU target $60/mo. Target 24-month MRR $18k (conservative).

nodes.label: Shopify Revenue Share Policy
nodes.rationale: 0% Shopify commission on first $1M/year; 15% above. Plus 2.9% payment processing fee.

nodes.label: Quick Order Form (F1)
nodes.description: Theme App Extension block. Bulk SKU table for wholesale ordering in under 60 seconds. Mobile card layout on small viewports.

nodes.label: Volume Pricing Display (F2)
nodes.description: Dynamic tier display with real-time nudges. Tier ladder on product page and QOF.

nodes.label: Branded Cart (F3)
nodes.description: Replaces default Shopify cart with theme-matching branded cart. Custom error messages instead of Shopify generics.

nodes.label: Admin Configuration UI (F4)
nodes.description: Polaris admin for configuring tiers, branding, copy, and B2B customer lifecycle without touching code.

nodes.label: Custom Error Messages (F5)
nodes.description: Replaces all Shopify generic error pages with branded messages. Minimum quantity, order value, product unavailability.

nodes.label: Stockly
nodes.author: Jonatan Montilla
nodes.description: Shopify App delivering enterprise-grade B2B wholesale features to Shopify Basic/Grow stores. Live in production on Fly.io.

nodes.label: Remix
nodes.description: Web framework used for Stockly backend and admin. TypeScript.

nodes.label: TypeScript
nodes.description: Primary programming language for Stockly backend.

nodes.label: Shopify Polaris
nodes.description: Shopify's design system and React component library used for Stockly admin UI.

nodes.label: Shopify App Bridge
nodes.description: Shopify library for embedding apps in Shopify Admin.

nodes.label: Theme App Extensions
nodes.description: Shopify's sanctioned mechanism for injecting UI into merchant themes. Used for storefront blocks.

nodes.label: Shopify Discount Function (WASM)
nodes.description: Core pricing engine: stockly-volume-discount extension under extensions/stockly-volume-discount/. WASM module targeting purchase.product-discount.run, executes server-side at checkout on all plans.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL (Fly Managed)
nodes.description: Production database. Fly Managed Postgres cluster, region iad, app stockly-db.

nodes.label: Fly.io
nodes.description: Production hosting. App stockly-lustrous-forest-4364, region iad. Replaced Vercel after Sprint 4 migration.

nodes.label: Prisma ORM
nodes.description: ORM used for DB schema and queries. Currently uses prisma db push (not versioned migrations).

nodes.label: Vitest
nodes.description: Unit testing framework for Stockly.

nodes.label: Playwright
nodes.description: E2E testing framework used ad-hoc for Stockly.

nodes.label: GitHub Actions
nodes.description: CI/CD platform. CI runs lint+test on push to main. Deploy to Fly is manual workflow_dispatch only.

nodes.label: Sprint Status (as of 2026-05-26)
nodes.description: Sprints 0-4 complete and shipped to production. Sprint 5+ is forward plan. Original stack pivot: Vercel + Supabase → Fly.io + Fly Managed Postgres (Sprint 4, ADR-009).

nodes.label: B2B eCommerce Market Size
nodes.description: Global B2B ecommerce $32.1T in 2025 (5x B2C), growing 14.4% YoY. Shopify B2B GMV +96% YoY. 11,905 apps in App Store, ~150 in B2B category.

nodes.label: Positioning Statement
nodes.description: The wholesale app for brands that care about how their B2B portal looks. Premium aesthetic first, less is more, mobile-first, theme-native, fast.

nodes.label: Ideal Customer Profile
nodes.description: Diptyque-style SMB DTC brand: 50-500 SKUs, $100k-2M ARR, 5-50 wholesale leads/month, premium theme (Ella, Impulse, Prestige, Horizon), designer-conscious founder.

nodes.label: Framework: Remix over Next.js
nodes.rationale: Shopify's official app template uses Remix. Better App Bridge integration. Server-side data loading aligns with Shopify session management. ADR-002.

nodes.label: Database: PostgreSQL (original: Supabase)
nodes.rationale: Original plan was Supabase free tier (500MB, 2GB bandwidth). Migrated to Fly Managed Postgres post Sprint-4 per ADR-009. Neon/PlanetScale/Vercel Postgres were alternatives considered and rejected.

nodes.label: ORM: Prisma
nodes.rationale: Comes with Shopify template. Type-safe queries. Migrations are predictable. Trade-off: heavier bundle than Drizzle/Kysely.

nodes.label: Storefront: Liquid + Web Components
nodes.rationale: Theme App Extensions only allow Liquid + Web Components (no React in storefront). Framework-agnostic, works in any theme.

nodes.label: Shopify Admin GraphQL API
nodes.description: Primary API for Orders, Customers, Companies, Products, Catalogs, Markets.

nodes.label: Shopify Storefront API
nodes.description: Used for per-customer prices in storefront blocks.

nodes.label: LTV/CAC Analysis
nodes.description: ARPU $60/mo x 18mo = LTV $1080. CAC $200 (paid) or $50 (organic). LTV/CAC ratio 5.4x (conservative) to 21.6x (organic).

nodes.label: Exit Scenarios
nodes.description: 1) Lifestyle business $30-50k MRR solo. 2) Small team SaaS $200-500k MRR. 3) Acquisition by Shopify-ecosystem buyer (Klaviyo, Yotpo, Gorgias) at 3-5x ARR.

nodes.label: BSS B2B Wholesale Solution (Competitor)
nodes.description: Largest direct competitor. 1022 reviews 4.8 stars. Free-$100/mo. Feature breadth, kitchen-sink UX, pre-Discount-Function architecture (structural debt). Pricing: Essential $25, Advanced $50, Platinum $100.

nodes.label: SparkLayer (Closest Competitor in Positioning)
nodes.description: Premium positioning, beautiful design, targets mid-market Shopify Plus. $199+/mo. Too expensive and complex for Stockly's SMB target.

nodes.label: Stockly Competitive Moat
nodes.description: 1) Domain expertise from Piro. 2) Premium brand. 3) Deep Shopify API knowledge (Discount Functions + Markets applicationLevel:ALL). 4) Theme-native execution. 5) Speed via solo+AI. 6) Adspubli agency pipeline.

nodes.label: B2B Pricing Technique 1: Discount Functions
nodes.description: WASM module targeting purchase.product-discount.run. Available on all Shopify plans (no plan gate). Config via DiscountNode metafield. Execution: eligibility check (wholesale tag or qualifiedCustomers GID), multiplicative discount composition, DiscountApplicationStrategy.All.

nodes.label: B2B Pricing Technique 2: Markets applicationLevel:ALL
nodes.description: marketUpdate mutation with MarketConditionsCompanyLocationsInput.applicationLevel:ALL. Works on Basic/Grow. Mutation-only, not available in Shopify admin UI. Phase 2 candidate for Stockly.

nodes.label: Discount Function Config Shape
nodes.description: JSON metafield: tiers[], wholesaleBaselinePct, fpqAmount, qualifiedCustomers[]. Max 256KB (~5000 customer GIDs). Execution O(lines x tiers), 50ms timeout.

nodes.label: Multiplicative Discount Composition
nodes.rationale: finalDiscountPct = 1 - (1 - baseline/100) * (1 - tier/100). Baseline and tier discounts are composed multiplicatively, never additively. Required by ADR-006.

nodes.label: Design System: Two Surfaces
nodes.rationale: Admin uses Polaris components + --p-* vars. Storefront uses --rf-color-* custom properties in registration-form.css and --sk-* tokens in stockly-base.css. They do not share a token set.

nodes.label: Admin Golden Rule: Polaris Only
nodes.rationale: Admin = Polaris components, never hand-rolled CSS. Storefront = --rf-color-* tokens. New screen must clone an existing pattern, not be derived from scratch.

nodes.label: List→Editor Screen Pattern
nodes.description: Canonical pattern for N-item management. List: Page + Banner + Card(padding=0) + Tabs + IndexTable. Editor: Page backAction + TitleBar + SaveBar + Layout (main + oneThird). Reference: app/routes/app.pricing._index.tsx and app.pricing.$id.tsx.

properties.description: Screenshot of the Sami Wholesale Shopify app loading screen, captured within the Shopify admin panel of a development store (desarrollo-adspubli). The main content area shows the Sami app branding — a green-and-yellow 'S' logo with the text 'Samita is loading...' — indicating the app is initializing. The left sidebar shows the full Shopify admin navigation (Inicio, Pedidos, Productos, Clientes, Marketing, Descuentos, Contenido, Mercados, Finanzas, Informes y estadísticas, Tienda online) plus installed apps including Flow, Judge.me Reviews, BSS B2B Solution, stockly, Sami Wholesale (selected/active), and Releasit COD Form. The store is in Spanish (es-ES) locale.
properties.competitive_relevance: Direct competitor to Stockly in the Shopify B2B/wholesale app space

properties.description: Sami Wholesale is a Shopify embedded app for B2B/wholesale management, branded as 'Samita'. It is a direct competitor to Stockly in the wholesale/B2B Shopify app market.

The screenshot was taken inside a Shopify admin dev store named 'desarrollo-adspubli', used by Adspubli for competitive research and app testing. Multiple competing B2B apps (BSS B2B Solution, Sami Wholesale, Stockly) are installed side-by-side for evaluation.

properties.upsell_banner: Protect your B2B registration page — Lock the registration page
properties.description: Screenshot of the Sami Wholesale Shopify app showing the Registration Form management screen. One active form named Standard exists with a liquid short-code embed tag. The UI supports filtering by All/Active/Draft, adding new forms, and protecting the registration page with a lock feature.

nodes.label: Sami Wholesale: Registration Form Management Feature

properties.competitive_relevance: Sami Wholesale offers a dedicated B2B customer registration flow with form management — a feature Stockly may need to match or differentiate from

nodes.norm_label: sami wholesale: registration form management feature

properties.purpose: Merchants embed the B2B registration form into any Shopify page via this short-code

properties.form_subtitle: Complete form below to signup for Shopify account
properties.layout: two-column for name fields, single-column for email/password

nodes.label: Quick Order Form Desktop
nodes.description: Desktop prototype of a Wholesale Quick Order Form (QOF Premium) for a B2B Shopify storefront. Shows a product table with columns: Producto, Precio, Cantidad, Subtotal. Features: wholesale discount badge (55%), volume pricing tiers (10+ uds -10%, 20+ uds -20%, 30+ uds -30%), per-product quantity steppers (−/+), crossed-out retail prices alongside wholesale prices, per-row subtotals, order total (€1,143.00), savings callout (Ahorras €1,397.00 frente a retail), and a CTA button 'Añadir todo al carrito'. Four sample products shown: Italian Leather Belt (BELT-001, €29.25), Cashmere Scarf (SCARF-001, €38.25), Sterling Silver Necklace (NECKLACE-001, €54.00), Premium Leather Wallet (WALLET-001, €20.25). UI is minimal, warm off-white background, Spanish language. Marked as prototype — not production.

nodes.label: Wholesale 55% Badge
nodes.description: A badge indicating the buyer has a 55% wholesale discount applied. Displayed prominently in the header area of the order form.

nodes.label: Volume Pricing Tiers Bar
nodes.description: Horizontal bar showing three volume discount tiers: 10+ uds -10%, 20+ uds -20%, 30+ uds -30%. Provides buyers with incentive to increase order quantity.

nodes.label: Product Row with Quantity Stepper
nodes.description: Each product row contains: thumbnail placeholder, product name + SKU, crossed-out retail price and wholesale price, a quantity stepper (− / number / +), and a calculated subtotal. Quantities in the prototype: Belt=12, Scarf=8, Necklace=0, Wallet=24.

nodes.label: Order Summary Footer
nodes.description: Footer section showing 'Total del pedido: €1,143.00', savings text 'Ahorras €1,397.00 frente a retail' in amber/gold color, and a prominent black CTA button 'Añadir todo al carrito'.

properties.prototype_label: PROTOTIPO — QUICK ORDER FORM PREMIUM · NO ES PRODUCCIÓN
properties.title: Wholesale order
properties.subtitle: Precios mayoristas aplicados en tu carrito al finalizar.

properties.description: 55% flat wholesale discount shown as badge; additional volume pricing tiers stacked (10+ -10%, 20+ -20%, 30+ -30%) applied on top. Retail prices shown struck-through next to discounted prices.
Single 'Añadir todo al carrito' button at the bottom adds all products with non-zero quantities to cart in one action. Order total and retail savings are displayed above the CTA.

hyperedges.label: Registration Form Editor System (3-pane builder)
Field Type System (icons + labels + edit form)
Volume Pricing Band Data Flow (Band <-> RawBandValue <-> DB Tier)
RegistrationForm definition/seed/validate trinity (ADR-013 Phase 1)
Shop hint cookie F5 recovery: build / read / validate domain work together
Wholesale approval: authenticate + Shopify GraphQL mutations + Prisma upsert + discount sync
Wholesale/Volume pricing CRUD routes all call syncTiersToFunction after writes
App Proxy routes — all HMAC-authenticated via authenticate.public.appProxy
Onboarding wizard 3-step state machine (Segment → Preset → CTA)
GDPR redaction pipeline — data_request ack + customers/redact hard-delete + shop/redact cascade
FPQ qualification pipeline — orders/paid evaluates rule → writes metafield → syncs discount + validation functions
ADR-012 Volume Pricing — createRule/updateRule/listRules manage N-band groups sharing groupId
All three FPQ banner components share the same approved_pre_fpq gate logic and FPQ mode evaluation
QOF, WPP, and discount function share tier scope-precedence (product > collection > all) + multiplicative baseline
Opening order test suite validates function against all JSON fixtures
Discount type system — percentage, fixed_amount, fixed_price each emit different Shopify output shapes
Three aggregation modes — per_line, cart_total, mix_variants — partition eligible tiers before winner selection
DB schema evolution — 4 migrations add wholesaleBaselinePct, aggregation, FPQ fields to core B2B tables
Verification pipeline: verify.sh + stockly-verify skill + deployment-guardian gate
Agent pipeline: orchestrator → implementer → reviewer → guardian
QOF design artifacts: prototype HTML + desktop screenshot + mobile screenshot
